title: Luki's Crazy Chambers
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/26fb2d73f7c1f7247711c2f3887a389c5a59a2ac.png)
# About:
Luki's Crazy Chambers is a data pack for 1.21 that focuses exclusively on the newly introduced Trial Chambers. I challenged myself to make a full-scale chamber revamp in 1 week; this data pack is the result. There are completely redesigned rooms, mobs, and loot. The Trial Chambers are now much bigger, and more rewarding to explore. 
# Attention: 
This data pack was made in a 1 week challenge so there may not be a lot of room diversity, if this data pack proves to be popular I'll add more rooms as time goes on.
Also, I didn't edit the actual rarity of the Trial Chambers, so they still appear as much as vanilla chambers do. If people would like them to be rarer I will make them rarer in future updates.
